title: Maple's Parrot Collection
description: Seasonal parrot variants with custom textures that change with the seasons!🦜
body:
✨Create Your Own Minecraft Parrot-dise 🦜

Custom designed parrot textures to bring a little something extra to your gameplay.

The textures change automatically with the seasons! (can be turned off)

🌱 The Sapling mod needs to be installed in order for this mod to work 🌱

⚙️This mod needs to be installed on both the client and the server so you can see the same textures as your friends 🤗 

 

 

 

 

 

 

The parrot variations spawn randomly across the world. 

The parrots stay in their own skin when re-opening a world, collect 'm all! 🤗

🌸☀️🍂❄️

The textures will automatically change per season. There will also still be regular parrots.

 

The season dates: day - month

🌸Spring:  01-03 / 31-05         ☀️Summer: 01-06 / 31-08 
🍂Autumn:  01-09 / 30-11          ❄️Winter:  01-12 / 28-02          

 

There is also an added command for which hemisphere you prefer! Northern or Southern 😊
(Northern is selected automatically)


‼️🏷️If you want to keep a certain parrot texture on a specific parrot for the whole year make sure to give

them a name tag before the new season starts! Otherwise, they will change. ‼️🏷️

 

Commands
⚙️To customize your experience.

 

Admin Tools
/maplemods parrot adminTools flipSeasonDatesToOtherHemisphere   | To change the hemisphere
/maplemods parrot adminTools resetAllLoadedEntityTextures   |  To reset the parrots that are already loaded in the game
/maplemods parrot adminTools reloadConfigFile  | To reload changes in the Config

 

Config Values
/maplemods parrot setConfigValues showCurrentValues
/maplemods parrot setConfigValues disableSeasonsDuringHoliday (false/true)  | Option to disable the mixture of the holidays and the seasonal textures.
/maplemods parrot setConfigValues nameTagPreventsTexture (false/true)  | Option to save the texture with the name tag or to disable it.
/maplemods parrot setConfigValues replaceSeasonalTextures  | To reload the textures after making a change.

 

Update Category Settings
/maplemods parrot updateCategorySettings _default   | Disable or enable the original parrot texture
/maplemods parrot updateCategorySettings <category> (disable/enable/setDate)  | Customize the seasons

 

Update Texture Settings
/maplemods parrot updateTextureSettings <texture> (disable/enable) | To specifically choose which textures to enable or disable

 

 

Very excited to finally design and launch my custom parrots!

✨ Hope you enjoy seeing them flying around as much as I enjoyed creating them ✨

The seasonal textures are also available with:

 

The Bees! 🐝

The Chickens! 🐥

The Creepers!💚

The Rabbits! 🐰

The Frogs! 🐸

 

More mobs coming soon!
